---
title: "Visualizing software artifacts using hypergraphs"
author:
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2010-05-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Proceedings - SCCG 2010: 26th Spring Conference on Computer Graphics"
  doi: "10.1145/1925059.1925067"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1145/1925059.1925067"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1145/1925059.1925067](https://doi.org/10.1145/1925059.1925067)
